user.title: Connect to ValueClouds
user.description: Enter your ValueClouds account credentials and your inverter's PN/SN/devcode. Capture these from your browser's DevTools Network tab while using the SmartValue/ValueClouds web app — see the integration's docs/dev-setup.md.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the ValueClouds API.

init.title: Battery runtime forecasting (optional)
init.description: Both fields are optional. If you leave capacity blank, MutaTrack derives it empirically from observed charge/discharge cycles instead — see docs/architecture.md.

error.invalid_capacity: Enter a positive number, or leave blank to use an empirically-derived estimate.

battery_capacity_deviation.title: Configured battery capacity doesn't match observed behavior
battery_capacity_deviation.description: The battery capacity you configured differs significantly from what MutaTrack has observed from real charge/discharge cycles. This can mean the configured value is wrong, or that the battery has degraded. Check Settings → Devices & Services → MutaTrack → Configure, and compare against the `capacity_kwh`/`capacity_source` attributes on the Battery time remaining sensor.
